_note: Hand-written sample matching the public LongMemEval dataset schema (xiaowu0162/longmemeval on Hugging Face): question_id, question_type, question, answer, question_date, haystack_session_ids, haystack_dates, haystack_sessions (list of {role, content} turns), answer_session_ids. Facts and conversations below are invented for this repo, not copied from the real dataset. See docs/methodology.md.

examples.question: What is the name of my dog?

haystack_sessions.content: I just adopted a golden retriever puppy named Baxter.
Congratulations on adopting Baxter! Golden retrievers are wonderful companions.
I'm thinking about repainting my kitchen a light blue.
Light blue is a calming choice for a kitchen.
Work has been busy lately, lots of client meetings.
That sounds demanding. Make sure to take breaks.

examples.question: Which city did I move to most recently?

haystack_sessions.content: I moved to Denver last month for a new job.
How is Denver treating you so far?
Update: I relocated again, this time to Austin, for the same company's new office.
Austin has a great tech scene, I hope the move went smoothly.

examples.question: What is my current job title?

haystack_sessions.content: I'm a Data Engineer at a logistics startup.
Nice, what kind of pipelines do you build?
I got promoted to Senior Data Engineer last week.
